tool.name: MAGs-visualization taxa-sankey
tool.help:
**MAGs-visualization: taxa-sankey**
This tool generates Sankey diagrams to visualize the taxonomic classification of MAGs based on GTDB annotations.
Outputs include:
- a Sankey plot showing the full taxonomy hierarchy - a Sankey plot filtered to the selected taxonomic rank
Sankey outputs are generated as HTML files using Plotly.
Depending on the Galaxy instance security settings, HTML content may be displayed as plain text. In this case, download the file and open it in a web browser to view the plot.
Requirements:
- GTDB taxonomy table
Output:
- Interactive HTML Sankey diagrams
Example output plots are available in the MAGs-visualization use cases with example configurations and parameter choices: https://github.com/usegalaxy-eu/MAGs-visualization/tree/main/use-cases
For a direct example (bee microbiome dataset): https://github.com/usegalaxy-eu/MAGs-visualization/tree/main/use-cases/bee-use-case/plots
